subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! I ask thee to forgive everything save my servitude to Thy Supreme Threshold...O thou who art calling by the Testament, in the Pivot of the horizons!... I affirm that the true meaning, the real significance, the innermost secret of these verses
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی استغفرک عن کل الشئون الا العبودیه لعتبتک السامیه و اتبرء عن کل ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
